title: Our Love Story
content:
Our love story started through a churchmate. She was one of the guests, and I couldn't help but notice her. Curious, I asked my churchmate for her name and later searched for her on Facebook. After many days of hesitation, I finally gathered the courage to message her—and that's where everything began.

We started with casual chatting and getting to know each other, and it eventually turned into something real.

We laughed together, supported each other through ups and downs, and built something special. Through it all, we've grown closer and stronger, showing that sometimes the best connections happen.
